Motion And Notice Of Hearing Of Order To Allow Pltf'S To Serve Financial Disco Requests
Off Calendar Aug-12-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Salvatore C. Timpano, Esq. of Law Office of Salvatore Timpano (Tel: 415.992.5170) for the Plaintiffs Walter Camingue and Priscilla Camingue;
Atty. Ted Broomfield, Esq. (Tel: 415.500.2029) co-counsel for the Plaintiffs Walter Camingue and Priscilla Camingue;
Atty. Andrew Klimenko, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 415.362.2580)
for Defendants Norma Yu Wong and Julius Wong.

Hearing on PLAINTIFFS WALTER CAMINGUE, PRISCILLA CAMINGUE'S Motion And Notice Of Hearing Of Order To Allow Plaintiff's To Serve Financial Discovery Requests.

Both counsel stipulate to the matter being heard by the judge pro tem.

Matter called, argument/discussions are held.

At the conclusion of argument/discussions, PLAINTIFFS WALTER CAMINGUE, PRISCILLA CAMINGUE'S Motion And Notice Of Hearing Of Order To Allow Plaintiff's To Serve Financial Discovery Requests is denied without prejudice.

Mr. Timpano is to prepare the proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312, and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Cohen for review and signature. Mr. Timpano's request that counsel each be allowed to submit a proposed if there is disputed language is granted.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Order To Duplicate Official Plans Of 300 And 312 Pioche Street, San Francisco, California 94134, Under Health And Safety Code Section 19851
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SALVATORE C. TIMPANO, Esq. of Law Offices of Salvatore C. Timpano (Tel: 415-992-5170) for plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS WALTER CAMINGUE and PRISCILLA CAMINGUE's Motion For Order To Duplicate Official Plans Of 300 And 312 Pioche Street, San Francisco, California 94134, Under Health And Safety Code Section 19851.

Plaintiffs stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for plaintiffs (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion for order to prepare and produce duplicate original plans is unopposed and is granted.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Order To Duplicate Official Plans Of 300 And 312 Pioche Street, San Francisco, California 94134, Under Health And Safety Code Section 19851
Off Calendar Jun-10-2022 Continued To Jul-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. SALVATORE C. TIMPANO, Esq. and TED BROOMFIELD, Esq. of Law Offices of Salvatore C. Timpano (Tel: 415-992-5170) for plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS WALTER CAMINGUE and PRISCILLA CAMINGUE's Motion For Order To Duplicate Official Plans Of 300 And 312 Pioche Street, San Francisco, California 94134, Under Health And Safety Code Section 19851.

Plaintiffs stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for plaintiffs (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to the sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter discussed as to the Court's concern regarding lack of service of the motion on the City of San Francisco Department of Building and Inspection.

The Court continues this matter to July 12, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. (to be heard by whichever pro tem judge is assigned to the July 12th calendar).

Plaintiffs are to serve the City of San Francisco Department of Building and Inspection with the motion.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
